stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
What flight conditions are most likely to be experienced in square 2B by an aircraft at FL 120?

options.a: VMC below an overcast of AS and CS, generally smooth air
options.b: VMC above layers of ST and SC, generally stable conditions
options.c: IMC in layers of AS and isolated CB risk of severe turbulence and icing
options.d: IMC in NS with risk of light icing
